special_mechanics.name: Movement Input Locking
special_mechanics.description: Tapping a direction for one frame forces character to move for four frames total. Player cannot interrupt this movement during the last three frames.

special_mechanics.name: Continuous Walking Animation
special_mechanics.description: Holding direction continuously allows character to walk for 24 frames with 6 different walking sprites. Direction is locked for full 24-frame animation cycle. Releasing d-pad interrupts animation.

special_mechanics.name: No Diagonal Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game does not support diagonal movement. When diagonal direction pressed, prioritizes horizontal movement over vertical.

tier_notes: Tier 2 data based on empirical documentation from TASVideos game resource page. Only movement speed precisely documented (2 pixels/frame). No jump physics, gravity, or sub-pixel data found in available sources. No vertical movement parameters documented. Movement system is highly constrained with forced input locking and animation cycles.
sources_used: TASVideos - Soul Blazer Game Resources page
